nodes.name: 漠地林莺
nodes.summary: 漠地林莺（Asian desert warbler，学名 Curruca nana），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 红海
nodes.summary: 红海是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括鸵鸟、大红鹳、小凤头燕鸥等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|Desert warbler at Kutch The Asian desert warbler (Curruca nana) is an Old World warbler which breeds in the deserts of central and western Asia and the extreme east of Europe (Volga Delta area east to western Inner Mongolia in China), and migrating to similar habitats in southwestern Asia (Arabia to northwestern India) and the far northeast of Africa (Red Sea coastal regions) in winter
